text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: So that's how the legend got started. They say that seein' the zashiki-warashi at the inn is a good omen.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Is that so? What an interesting story!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yukino… that doesn't scare you at all?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Not really? The wild boar and deer are much 
more of a problem in ma hometown.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
And there's so many rivers an' trees 
that've been there for who knows 
how long. Maybe I've always been 
close to some strange things.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
So mysterious presences in the great swath 
of nature… That sounds great.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Friends with nature? Sounds like Yuki 
for sure!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Just yesterday, I saw her in the woods behind
the academy, walking with a whole bunch of
white kittens!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I mean, I was just runnin' 
by mahself yesterday…
